Defense News Asia Pacific

India raises defence budget capital outlay, boosting procurement

Defense News Staff · 17 June 2026

India has increased the capital outlay in its defence budget, earmarking additional funds for domestic procurement of artillery, armoured vehicles and ammunition. The government reaffirmed its push for indigenous content under the Atmanirbhar Bharat initiative.

Industry observers expect the higher allocation to accelerate orders for 155mm gun systems and precision munitions over the next two fiscal years, benefiting both public-sector units and private manufacturers in India.

The budget signals continued momentum in India's defence modernisation across multiple segments.
